commentary: Eleven sessions this week versus twelve last week, which is basically a rounding error — you showed up, you moved, and that 13.1km run on Saturday at 159 average heart rate versus last week's 151 tells me you were working harder, not coasting. The swim volume held beautifully, with three solid two-kilometre sessions at Prince Alfred plus a cheeky little B&B warm-up to kick things off, and I am choosing to believe the 🩲 emoji appearing on every single swim entry means exactly what I think it means. The double-session days on Sunday and Monday are giving very "I have no chill and also a great body" energy, which is correct and on brand. One morning walk on Thursday, a bit of breathing room before that Saturday run — good instinct, actually, because you came out swinging and the heart rate proves it.
